name: Matte White Stone Rocks Decorative Filler - Threshold™
description:
Elevate your home decor with these 42-Piece Matte White Stone Rocks Decorative Filler from Threshold™. This pack includes 42 stone rocks in matte finish, ideal for filling vases, bowls, and terrariums for a visually striking display. Featuring a white hue, these stones are great for crafting DIY art projects or beautiful floral arrangements.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
